# WAEPack
A community maintained continuation of the now discontinued [J0Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/j0pack/), WAEPack introduces a soft and unique new look to the game.

## 3D Models (Optional)
In addition to the base pack there's also `waepack-models` which contains optional 3D textures for blocks like ladders, lily pads, iron bars and more.

## Optifine
WAEPack also has support for the Optifine format allowing further customization such as custom loading screen colors.

## Community paintings
All the paintings in the pack are provided by the WAEverything Discord community. The list of painting authors can be found [here](https://github.com/waeverything/WAEPack/blob/main/painting-authors.md).

## Recommended shaders
Shaders that we have tested to work well with WAEPack:
- [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [RenderPearl](https://modrinth.com/shader/renderpearl)
- [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders)
- [Nostalgia Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader)

![Recommended shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41bf52f9db55bec369a45635742881999befd40.webp)

## Contributing
If you have any time to spare, we would love to have you being part of this project! You can find more information about contributing on our [Github](https://github.com/waeverything/waepack).
